services.title: Services
items: Specialized translation of documents English ⇄ Spanish.

values.title: Our values
values.subtitle: We strive for excellence through human quality.
values.description: At MedMind, as we are aware of the impact of words, every linguistic decision is well-founded.

empathy.title: Empathy
empathy.description: We connect with the intention behind every word to preserve the human touch.

clarity.title: Clarity
clarity.description: We facilitate communication through direct, coherent, and effective messages.

callToAction.question: Do you have any project in mind?

footer.tagline: MedMind is an ally for conscious translations focused on building linguistic bridges with empathy, precision, and a deeply human vision.

intro.description: MedMind was born from the union of knowledge, sensitivity, and professional responsibility.
intro.purpose: It is a brand created to go hand in hand with sensitive communications in contexts where words are not neutral and language has a real impact on people.

personality.title: Personality
personality.description: It communicates calmly, clearly, and prudently to reduce linguistic risks. It is precise without being rigid, approachable without being informal, and professional without being cold.

purpose.title: Purpose
purpose.description: Humanizing specialized communication in sensitive contexts to ensure that each message retains its meaning, clarity, and human impact when shifting from one language to another.

mission.title: Mission
mission.description: Helping healthcare and education professionals and institutions communicate accurately, clearly, and sensitively, being mindful of the impact of language at every stage of the process.

vision.title: Vision
vision.description: Be a leader in the sector and achieve recognition for professional judgment, human qualities, and empathy when dealing with sensitive messages.

guillermina.name: Guillermina Bassi
guillermina.bio:
She is a translator and interpreter specialized in the medical and Life Sciences fields. She has more than five years of experience working with technical and regulated documents in high-responsibility contexts.

She has a Master's Degree in Medical and Health Translation, completed in Universitat Jaume I, in Spain, and she has complemented her academics with other studies and continuous trainings in medical translation and project management. Throughout her career, she has worked with pharmaceutical documentation, clinical trials, certificates of analysis, and scientific texts aimed at both professionals and patients.

At MedMind, Guillermina brings technical expertise, commitment, and a calm and rigorous approach to her work, focused on preserving meaning and clarity in every project.

lucia.name: Lucía Biselli
lucia.bio:
She is a translator specialized in the medical and mental health fields with over six years of experience working in healthcare and educational contexts where accuracy and sensitivity are essential.

Throughout her career, she has participated in projects related to clinical trials, pharmaceutical documentation, medical devices, psychological assessments, and educational materials. She also has training in Psychology, which enhances her understanding of the human dimensions of language in mental health and well-being contexts.

At MedMind, Lucía brings professional judgment, experience in review processes and linguistic quality, and a deep commitment to clear and respectful communication.

contact.title: Leave your message in good hands
